prompt: Create a square, cinematic close-up portrait of an androgynous young adult with tousled dark hair in a dim indoor setting, cropped tightly so the head and shoulders fill the frame. The person wears a dark charcoal knit sweater and rests one hand near the chin in a thoughtful pose, with softly visible fingers at the lower center. Use moody low-key lighting, shallow depth of field, muted warm-gray background, realistic skin and hair texture, and a subdued film-photography look with slight grain. Place a large opaque square privacy block directly over the center of the face, covering most facial features from the forehead down to the mouth; the block should be a smooth vertical gradient from near-black dark brown at the top to medium warm brown at the bottom, with sharp straight edges, centered and occupying most of the image width and height. Keep only the hair edges, one ear area, shoulder, sweater, and hand partially visible around the block. No text, no watermark, no decorative elements.
